creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
For example: 

root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:~ # service netdata status
netdata is not running.
root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:~ # sysrc netdata_enable
netdata_enable: YES
root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:~ # service netdata restart
netdata not running?
Starting netdata.
root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:~ # uname -aKU
FreeBSD mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd 14.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 14.0-CURRENT #38 main-n262032-5e2e3615d91f: Fri Apr  7 18:54:28 BST 2023     grahamperrin@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC-NODEBUG amd64 1400085 1400085
root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:~ # pkg iinfo netdata
netdata-1.38.1
root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:~ #
